title: Sales funnel widget - select more than one board to show data
excerpt:
Now in the widget you can select only one specific array to display data. 
In our organization, we have business in progress on board A, wins on board B and losses on board C. This prevents us from using this widget.

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now in the widget you can select only one specific array to display data.
In our organization, we have business in progress on board A, wins on board B and losses on board C. This prevents us from using this widget.
